### Architecture Context
This PR introduces the final architectural guide in the Agent OS documentation series: `Progressive Disclosure Skills` (`learn/agentos/ProgressiveDisclosureSkills.md`).

### Implementation Details
- Docs the skill lifecycle triad (`ticket-intake` -> `pull-request` -> `pr-review`).
- Expands on the token economics that mandate lazy-loading instructions.
- Defines the progressive disclosure pattern and how skills compose dynamically with the root `AGENTS.md` mandates.
- Registers the new guide inside the `learn/tree.json` structure.
- Add reciprocal cross-links in `SwarmIntelligence.md`, `StrategicWorkflows.md`, and `CodebaseOverview.md`.

Resolves #9986
